725 GG0170A3_ROLL_END_CD GG0170A3_ROLL_END_CD GG0170A3 Roll End Indicator CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to roll from lying on back to left and right side, and return to lying on back on the bed at the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate
